column3: An activity that altered a physical thing without bringing a new object into existence (e.g., embedding, polishing, coating, retouching).

This model records an alteration event affecting a physical thing (sample or painting). It captures identification, description, event typing, responsible actors, time and place, the thing modified, methods/protocols followed, materials used, tools/equipment employed, and the documentary evidence supporting the event.
The physical thing that was altered by the modification (e.g., a sample or a painting).
The actor (individual or organisation) responsible for carrying out or authorising the modification activity.
The place where the modification activity occurred (e.g., lab, studio).
Documents that describe or evidence the modification (e.g., treatment notes, SOPs, reports).
A defined method or protocol followed during the modification.
Materials consumed or applied in the modification (e.g., resin, polish, varnish).
Specific tools or equipment used during the modification.
